name: Sorcery
description: Sorcery now causes a hero's spells to inflict an additional 10%/20%/30% damage in combat and increases power skill by 1/2/3
author: Vũ Đắc Hoàng Ân

vietnamese.name: Sorcery
vietnamese.description: Ma Pháp tăng thêm 10%/20%/30% sát thương phép và 1/2/3 lực
vietnamese.author: Vũ Đắc Hoàng Ân
